auth.title: Sign in to DPD Admin

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.subtitle: Monitor and manage delivery drivers
drivers.emptySearchDescription: Try a different name, phone, or driver ID.

errors.save_failed: Could not update status. Please try again.

drivers.emptyDescription: Add your first driver to get started

partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: Delivery partners — used when assigning drivers
partners.emptySearchDescription: Try adjusting search or filters, or reset filters to see all partners.
partners.titleHint: Display name shown in the admin panel and driver app.
partners.descriptionHint: Optional — helps staff pick the right partner when creating drivers.
partners.logoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG. Max 2 MB.
partners.deleteConfirm: Delete partner "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
partners.emptyDescription: Add delivery partners like Talabat or Uber Eats.

errors.not_authorized: You do not have permission to manage partners
errors.slug_exists: A partner with this name already exists
errors.has_drivers: Remove driver assignments before deleting this partner
errors.missing_file: Choose a logo file to upload

errors.save_failed: Could not save the partner. Please try again.

driverDetail.title: Driver Details
driverDetail.subtitle: Profile and operational history
driverDetail.notFoundDescription: This driver may have been removed or the link is invalid.
driverDetail.linkedHint: Set automatically when the driver signs in on the app with this phone number
driverDetail.emptyTabDescription: This section will be available in a future update.

passcode.title: Driver App Passcode
passcode.description: 6-digit PIN the driver uses to sign in to the mobile app. Share it privately.
passcode.inactiveHint: Passcode is generated automatically once the driver is set to active.
passcode.regenerateConfirm: Generate a new passcode? The driver's current passcode will stop working immediately.
passcode.regenerateFailed: Could not regenerate the passcode. Please try again.

driverNew.title: Add Driver
driverNew.subtitle: Register a new rider — linked when they sign in on the driver app
driverNew.r2NotConfigured: File storage is not configured. Add Cloudflare R2 API credentials before uploading driver documents.
driverNew.r2NotConfiguredOptional: File storage (R2) is not configured. You can still create the driver without documents, or configure R2 to upload files now.
driverNew.created: Driver registered. They can link their account via the mobile app.

sections.restaurantsDescription: Optional — assign merchants this driver delivers for (must match the selected partner)
sections.documentsDescription: All uploads are optional — add files now or complete them later.

driverNew.assetsDisabled: No assets will be recorded for this driver.
driverNew.uploadFormats: PDF, PNG, JPG, or WebP · max 16 MB
driverNew.documentPendingHint: Optional — stored securely when you create the driver

hints.phone: 8 digits only — Kuwait mobile, no country code

driverNew.restaurantsSelectPartnerFirst: Select a partner first to choose restaurants.
driverNew.restaurantsEmptyForPartner: No published restaurants for this partner.

errors.not_authorized: You do not have permission to manage drivers
errors.invalid_phone: Enter exactly 8 digits for the mobile number
errors.invalid_civil_id: Enter exactly 12 digits for the civil ID
errors.phone_exists: This phone number is already registered
errors.driver_code_exists: This driver ID is already in use
errors.file_too_large: File must be 16 MB or smaller
errors.invalid_file_type: Use PDF, PNG, JPG, or WebP
errors.r2_not_configured: File storage is not configured. Set up Cloudflare R2 in Settings first.
errors.invalid_restaurants: One or more restaurants do not belong to the selected partner
errors.save_failed: Could not save the driver. Please try again.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.subtitle: Merchants under delivery partners — link to drivers when creating or editing riders
restaurants.deleteRestaurantDescription: Remove "{name}"? Drivers and rules referencing it may be affected.
restaurants.emptyDescription: Add merchants under a partner so you can assign them to drivers and delivery rules.

hints.externalMerchantId: Optional code from the partner platform (Talabat ID, DoorDash store ID, etc.).
hints.mapLink: Optional — paste a Google Maps or Apple Maps share link.
hints.pickLocation: Search for a place or click the map to pin the restaurant. Coordinates are saved automatically.
hints.mapAutoFilled: Auto-filled from pin — you can edit.
hints.googleKeyMissing: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY to enable place search. Click-to-pin still works.
hints.status: Only published restaurants are selectable when adding a driver.

errors.not_authorized: You do not have permission to manage restaurants
errors.missing_fields: Partner, zone, and name are required
errors.noPartners: Add a partner before creating restaurants.
errors.noZones: Add a zone before creating restaurants.
errors.restaurant_exists: A restaurant with this name already exists for this partner
errors.invalid_coordinates: Latitude and longitude must both be set and within valid ranges.

deliveries.title: Deliveries
deliveries.subtitle: View and verify all delivery records
deliveries.emptyDescription: Delivery records will appear here once drivers submit orders.
deliveries.emptySearchDescription: Try a different driver name, order ID, or delivery ID.

zones.title: Zones
zones.subtitle: Geographic delivery zones
zones.driversAssigned: {count, plural, one {# driver assigned} other {# drivers assigned}}
zones.noDrivers: No drivers assigned to this zone
zones.formDescription: Draw a polygon or circle on the map to define the zone boundary.
zones.fieldColorHint: Auto-assigned when creating; pick a swatch or use the palette for a custom color.
zones.customColorHint: Pick any color from the wheel
zones.radiusHint: Between 50 m and 50 km. Draw a circle on the map or adjust after drawing.
zones.drawHint: Click Start drawing, then click the map to place corners. Finish the polygon by clicking the first point or double-clicking. Only one shape per zone.
zones.geometryReady: Zone boundary drawn — you can save
zones.geometryPending: Draw a boundary on the map to enable save
zones.polygonFinishHint: Place at least 3 corners, then finish with double‑click anywhere on the map, press Enter, or click the starting point.
zones.nameHint: Shown in the drivers app and on the zones list.
zones.codeHint: Short identifier — visible on shipping labels and reports.
zones.colorHelp: Helps drivers spot the zone on the map at a glance.
zones.polygonTypeHint: Free‑form boundary — best for irregular neighborhoods.
zones.circleTypeHint: Pick a center point and radius — best for delivery rings.
zones.tipDraw: Click the pencil button on the map to start drawing.
zones.tipFinish: Polygon: double‑click or press Enter to finish. Circle: drag to set the radius.
zones.tipEdit: After drawing, drag the handles to fine‑tune the shape.
zones.tipClear: Use the trash button on the map to clear and start over.
zones.deleteConfirm: Delete zone "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
zones.deleteConfirmWithDrivers: This zone has {count} assigned driver(s). Delete anyway? Drivers will keep their records but lose zone assignment only if you reassign them separately.

errors.not_authorized: You do not have permission to manage zones
errors.geometry_required: Draw a zone on the map before saving
errors.invalid_radius: Radius must be between 50 m and 50 km
errors.has_drivers: Remove driver assignments before deleting this zone
errors.save_failed: Could not save the zone. Please try again.

deliveryRules.subtitle: Define which verified deliveries count toward incentives

incentiveRules.subtitle: Target deliveries and reward amounts by zone, partner, or restaurant

earningsCalculation.title: Earnings calculation
earningsCalculation.subtitle: Preview, recalculate, and test delivery eligibility

dpd.title: DPD
dpd.subtitle: Incentives, delivery rules, and earnings calculation
dpd.stackingHint: Matching incentive rules stack. Within one tiered rule, every met tier pays cumulatively.

hints.baseMinimum: Driver must reach this count before any payout from this rule.
hints.cumulativeTiers: Each tier pays when eligible deliveries reach its threshold; amounts add together.
hints.cumulativePayout: Pay for every delivery above the base immediately, without waiting for the target/tier to be reached.
hints.overridesOthers: When on, this rule's payout replaces all other incentive rules for the period.

dpd.calcDescription: Incentives recalculate automatically when a delivery is verified. Use preview or recalculate for corrections.

errors.not_authorized: You do not have permission to manage earnings
errors.invalid_dates: End date must be on or after start date
errors.invalid_target: Target must be greater than base minimum
errors.invalid_base: Base minimum must be zero or greater
errors.invalid_tiers: Add at least one tier with increasing thresholds above base
errors.invalid_reward: Reward must be zero or greater

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.subtitle: Control what each role can access in the panel
roles.copyApplied: Permissions copied — save to apply to role
roles.superAdminNote: Super Admin always has full access and is not shown in the matrix.
roles.selectColumn: Click a column header to select a role for duplicate.

dialogs.newDescription: Add a custom role. Slug is fixed after creation.
dialogs.duplicateDescription: Create a new role with the same permissions as the selected column.
dialogs.renameDescription: Update the display name for this custom role.

maintenance.title: Maintenance mode
maintenance.subtitle: Block panel access for all users except super admin
maintenance.enabled: Maintenance mode is ON — only super admin can sign in.

storage.title: Cloudflare R2 storage
storage.subtitle: Secure storage for driver documents and partner logos
storage.howToDescription: Create a private bucket and API token before saving credentials here.

steps.createBucket: R2 → Create bucket (e.g. dpd-private), keep it private.
steps.createToken: Manage R2 API tokens → Create token with Object Read & Write for that bucket.
steps.fillForm: Paste Account ID, Access Key ID, Secret Access Key, and bucket name below, then test connection.

storage.envOverride: R2 credentials are loaded from server environment variables on this deployment. Database values are ignored until env vars are removed.
storage.credentialsDescription: Used for driver document uploads and partner logos. Only super admins can view or edit.

fields.secretPlaceholderKeep: Leave blank to keep existing secret

storage.secretHint: Current secret: {masked}. Leave the field empty when saving to keep it.

errors.missing_fields: Fill in account ID, access key, and bucket name

menuEditor.title: Menu Editor
menuEditor.subtitle: Rename, reorder, hide, and group sidebar items per role. Ungrouped items can sit anywhere between groups.
menuEditor.resetConfirm: Reset menu for {role} to registry defaults?
menuEditor.modeHintPanel: Group label with all items listed below in the sidebar.
menuEditor.modeHintInline: Single row in the sidebar; opens a secondary menu with its items.
menuEditor.copySectionHint: Copy saves immediately to the target role. Use “Load into editor” to preview on the current role before saving.
menuEditor.copyConfirm: Copy menu settings from {from} to {to}? This will overwrite the target role's menu.
menuEditor.loadFromDiscard: You have unsaved changes. Load from another role and discard them?
menuEditor.loadedFromDesc: Loaded settings from {role}. Save to apply to this role.

translationEditor.title: Edit translations — {locale}
translationEditor.subtitle: English is the source of truth. Save updates the locale message file.
translationEditor.englishReadOnly: English source strings are edited in src/messages/en.json.
